title: Silver Valley
writer: Harry Sinclair Drago, Harold B. Lipsitz, Malcolm Stuart Boylan
actors: Tom Mix, Tony the Horse, Dorothy Dwan
plot: Rancher Tom Tracey is so infatuated with flying that he adds wings and a propeller to the ranch jalopy, which spooks and upsets his horse Tony more than a little bit. But when rustlers strike the range and kidnap Tom's sweetheart,...
